headline: AtkinsRéalis Wins Major Rail Deals And NVIDIA AI Pact Reshapes Outlook
summary: AtkinsRéalis Group (TSX:ATRL) has been awarded a major Network Rail contract to upgrade signalling and telecoms infrastructure in Southern England as part of a government backed rail modernization program. The company has been selected as preferred bidder in a consortium to deliver core systems for Québec City's tramway project. AtkinsRéalis has also announced a new collaboration with NVIDIA focused on combining nuclear power and advanced AI technologies for next generation data...

headline: Dassault Systèmes AI Push With NVIDIA Puts Focus On Undervalued Shares
